goals.title: OpenDART full-market validation preflight and safe run
goals.objective:
OpenDART full-market validation preflight and safe run
Inspect existing local untracked settings/environment without printing secret values.
Attempt OpenDART full-market validation only when safe local credentials/settings are already available.
Use reasonable safeguards: cache, request delay/rate-limit awareness, bounded logs, and sanitized summaries.
If credentials/settings are unavailable, record a no-secret blocker/residual risk instead of asking for secrets.
Do not run Google Sheets live read, Telegram live send, v0.3 scheduling/runbook/retry work, broker/order/rebalancing work, release tag, or deployment.
goals.evidence: OpenDART full-market validation preflight/run completed with safe local settings: no secret values printed, no Google Sheets live read, no Telegram live send; FDR universe failed 404 and pykrx universe failed empty-index, so validation used OpenDART corp-code fallback universe 3,967 records; DART corp-code cache hit; 3,936 delayed API calls at 0.2s; evidence .omx/evidence/opendart-full-market-validation-20260608T232458Z.json/.md; top provider failure provider_failed:opendart:dart_status:013=1,754; generated data remains under ignored data/market_cache.

goals.title: Evidence interpretation and optional code/test hardening
goals.objective:
Evidence interpretation and optional code/test hardening
Review validation output for `dart_status:013`, missing financial fields, rate-limit symptoms, API coverage gaps, or taxonomy propagation bugs.
Treat consistent OpenDART coverage gaps as documentable residual risk, not v0.2 blockers.
If a real code/taxonomy propagation bug is found, fix it only within existing provider/reporting boundaries and add or adjust tests.
Preserve `provider_failed:opendart:dart_status:013` and existing `missing_*` exclusion behavior; do not change scoring/strategy or add providers/dependencies.
goals.evidence: Interpreted full-market evidence without code changes: validation used opendart_corp_code_fallback 3,967 records after FDR 404 and pykrx empty-index provider failures; top provider failure stayed provider_failed:opendart:dart_status:013=1,754; missing_* exclusions were stable; direct validation had fundamentals_count=0 because no market PER metrics were attached, treated as evidence-run limitation not taxonomy bug. Targeted pytest passed: tests/test_phase1.py -k 'dart_status or missing_peg_inputs or apply_financial_data' => 4 passed. Interpretation artifact: .omx/evidence/opendart-full-market-interpretation-20260608T2344Z.md.

goals.title: Korean v0.2 release-closure documentation
goals.objective:
Korean v0.2 release-closure documentation
Update Korean project docs under `docs/` to summarize sanitized full-market evidence or the safe-skip blocker.
Explain whether OpenDART coverage gaps such as `dart_status:013` block v0.2; the default interview decision is residual risk when code/tests/taxonomy are consistent.
Keep current product scope clear: Google Sheets-based weekend candidate review only, no automatic orders/buy sizing/target weights/auto-rebalancing/current broker integration.
Do not include API keys, credential paths/values, spreadsheet IDs, Telegram tokens/chat IDs, account identifiers, private portfolio rows, or generated runtime data.
goals.evidence: Updated Korean docs/STATUS.md, docs/ROADMAP.md, and docs/qa/OPENDART_COVERAGE_HARDENING_2026-06-08.md with sanitized 2026-06-09 KST full listed-company evidence: OpenDART corp-code fallback universe 3,967, 3,936 delayed DART calls, dart_status:013=1,754, missing_peg_inputs=2,213; documented FDR 404 and pykrx empty-index as public universe provider residual risk; preserved product scope and non-goals; git diff --check docs passed; docs secret-pattern scan found 0 findings.

goals.title: Final verification, cleanup/review gate, and safe commit
goals.objective:
Final verification, cleanup/review gate, and safe commit
Run `python3 -m pytest` after any code/test changes; run the smallest relevant validation for docs-only changes.
Run git diff checks and a non-printing secret-safety review over intended tracked changes.
Run the mandatory Ultragoal final cleanup/review gate before marking the aggregate goal complete.
Stage and commit only task-related tracked changes with Conventional Commit plus Lore trailers.
Do not commit generated `data/`, local settings, credential files, tokens, private portfolio data, unrelated existing changes, or release/deployment artifacts.
goals.evidence: Final gate passed: python3 -m pytest 63 passed; diff check passed; intended-change secret scan 0 findings; ai-slop-cleaner no-op/readability cleanup report written; independent code-reviewer APPROVE and architect CLEAR; only intended tracked files will be staged/committed, excluding unrelated src/main.py, src/reporting.py, untracked files, generated data, local settings, and credentials.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
